features: The NEW Soft & Gentle 3x triple action range offers a superior sensorial experience
Formulated to be gentle on the skin
Unique fragrances beautifully crafted for long lasting fragrance effect
description: Product Description SOFT & GENTLE Orchid Desire anti-perspirant spray now provides you with 3x Triple Action benefit, delivering a superior sensorial experience that provides 48h protection, is gentle on skin and has a long lasting fragrance. Ingredients Butane, Isobutane, Propane, Aluminum Chlorohydrate, Isopropyl Myristate, Isopropyl Palmitate, C12-15 Alkyl Benzoate, Parfum, Disteardimonium Hectorite, Allantoin, Hydrogenated Soybean Oil, Propylene Carbonate, Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone, Limonene, Coumarin, Citronellol Directions Shake well, hold upright 15cm from your underarm before spraying. Do not apply on sore or broken skin Safety Warning For external use only Manufacturer Contact Information Karium Ltd, Bracknell, RG12 8FZ, UK. Papendorpseweg 99, 3528 BJ Utrecht, NL. See more
